signUp.title: Create account
signUp.switchToSignIn: Already have an account? Sign in

confirmEmail.title: Check your email
confirmEmail.instructions: We sent a 6-digit code to {{email}}. Enter it below.

errors.emailAlreadyExists: An account with this email already exists.
errors.invalidCode: The code is incorrect or expired.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment.
errors.passwordTooWeak: Password is too weak. Use at least 12 characters, one uppercase letter, one number, and one special character.
errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

sessionExpired.title: Session expired
sessionExpired.message: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
